ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the student (e.g., 9th, 10th, 11th, 12th) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student's family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Public, Charter, Private) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the school principal */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the score is recorded (e.g., reading, math) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student in the subject */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., mid-term, final, standardized) */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher who administered the test */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class in which the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school district office */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the superintendent */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_affiliation" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district to which the school belongs */,
  "affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was affiliated with the district */,
  "affiliation_status" TEXT /* Current affiliation status (e.g., active, pending, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_affiliation_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_affiliation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_school_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Average attendance rate of the student */,
  "graduated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the student has graduated */,
  "postsecondary_institution" TEXT /* Name of the postsecondary institution the student attended after graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_school_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_school_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
